headline: India's restaurants are under threat from the LPG supply crunch caused by the Iran war
summary: Restaurants in India are facing closure as the government restricts the supply of LPG as cooking fuel, industry representatives tell CNBC.

raw.headline: India's restaurants are under threat from the LPG supply crunch caused by the Iran war
raw.summary: Restaurants in India are facing closure as the government restricts the supply of LPG as cooking fuel, industry representatives tell CNBC.

headline: Copper shortage looms as tariff fears, mine disruptions fuel tightness
summary: "It's like an artificial tightness right now in the markets because you have all this material in the U.S., but not enough outside," a strategist told CNBC.

raw.headline: Copper shortage looms as tariff fears, mine disruptions fuel tightness
raw.summary: "It's like an artificial tightness right now in the markets because you have all this material in the U.S., but not enough outside," a strategist told CNBC.
